newsSince: Material catalyst in the window: Shuanglin's 100,000-unit planetary roller-screw line is scheduled to begin mass production in June 2026 with first sample deliveries (vs only ~1,500 units in 2025), and the Wuxi Kezhi second-gen machine-tool factory comes online (~40 units/month). It has delivered multiple prototype rounds of joint modules/dexterous hands to leading domestic humanoid OEMs with customer approval — direct evidence the actuation-stack scale-up is real.

sources.label: Futubull: Shuanglin main-business improvement, screw growth curve
AIGBK: Shuanglin humanoid robot business progress

verdicts.rankRationale: No new fundamental evidence since June 9. Roller-screw line still in customer verification with no designation, so the body-stack component thesis is unproven but unchanged; -5% move is noise. Hold pending a design-win catalyst.
verdicts.bull: Roller-screw/actuation candidate for humanoid body-stack with large rerating room after a big YTD pullback (-24%).
verdicts.neutral: Component thesis unconfirmed - still in verification, no designation; auto-parts core dominates.
verdicts.bear: No humanoid design win secured; remains an auto-parts supplier with speculative robot optionality.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Roller-screw customer designation / humanoid design win.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Verification fails or designation slips; thesis stays speculative.
